default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential leadership role at fwd.digital and address candidate's questions and concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bridget is considering a senior leadership role at fwd.digital, transitioning from a Series B company](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Marcel emphasized the importance of conviction in the company and its mission for this critical role](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Discussed equity, fundraising plans, and potential growth/exit paths for the company](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Explored the scope of the role, including operations, finance, legal, and talent acquisition responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Agreed to continue discussions over the weekend and make a decision by next week](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Fundraising

  - [fwd.digital is growing rapidly, with 8 new accounts starting and 8 recently launched](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Considering raising funds to accelerate growth and invest in engineering/product development](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Projections show potential burn of \~$500k, mainly for hiring engineering and increasing capacity](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Company received a merger offer for $150 million in December, indicating strong market interest](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Marcel open to various growth paths, including VC funding or building a "cash machine" with profit-sharing](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

### Role Scope and Responsibilities

  - [Position would involve wide-ranging responsibilities across operations, finance, legal, and talent acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Marcel seeking a thought partner and execution partner to help scale the business](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
  - [Potential areas of focus:](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)
      - [Client database management and health tracking](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=2411.0)
      - [Financial projections and cash flow management](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=2467.0)
      - [Capacity planning and strategic hiring](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=2707.0)
      - [Systems and process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)

### Talent Acquisition and Team Structure

  - [Company growing more efficiently than typical SaaS businesses (e.g., 40 people at $6M ARR vs. 100 at HashiCorp)](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=2812.0)
  - [Discussing options for talent acquisition, including in-house recruiter vs. external agencies](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=2999.0)
  - [Importance of high-quality hires due to immediate impact on client work and revenue](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=2923.0)

### Remote Work and Team Dynamics

  - [Leadership team primarily based in San Francisco, but open to remote work](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
  - [Quarterly in-person meetings for leadership team considered important for alignment and relationship-building](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)

### Compensation and Title

  - [Discussing potential titles (e.g., Chief of Staff and VP of Ops) with room for growth](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [ESOP (Employee Stock Option Plan) still being created](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Marcel open to providing liquidity opportunities for leaders as the company grows](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to review materials and consider the opportunity over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=3313.0)
  - [Continue discussions via email regarding title and specific role details](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=3332.0)
  - [Aim for a decision or update by Monday, even if not a final commitment](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=3256.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare for next steps with other candidates if needed](https://fathom.video/share/T8hddZ5aGK4iNJ73bJHgVjkY2JeVBaBr?tab=summary&timestamp=3272.0)

action_items.description: Review offer details over weekend. Provide update on decision/next steps on Monday.
